Localization.Description: An operation on a user account

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} created the AD sync account {object.name}
The user created the AD sync account {object.name}
The user {subject.account.name} created the AD sync account {object.name} on behalf of the account {object.account.name}
The user deleted the AD sync account {object.name}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted the account {object.name} on behalf of the account {object.account.name}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted the AD sync account {object.name}
The user {subject.account.name} deleted the AD sync account {object.name} on behalf of the account {object.account.name}
The user {subject.account.name} created the account {object.name} on behalf of the account {object.account.name}
